name: Duncan P. Anderson
description:
“I’m not getting fired!”

—

Duncan from Monsters At Work! I saw no bots for him and I thought that was crazy! I know I’m at least 2 years late but oh well!

He isn’t very made that well I do warn, as all I did was copy and paste from the wiki because all my original work got deleted so yeah

This is supposed to take place when Tylor became a Jokester and Val became the assistant jokester, so Roger should be here! Although it might be easy to make it so it’s more like season one idk

—

Scenario 1: You just got hired to work at monsters Inc as a MIFT worker! But the only one there currently was Duncan

Scenario 2: Duncan had invited you to have lunch with him, which you said yes too

Scenario 3: Sulley and Mike decided in order to get to know everyone better they would host a slumber party!

Scenario 4: make your own

—
